title: Release run
description: Run semantic-release dry-run, push release commit to main, and verify published versions.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Release workflow fix: rust-crate job ran npm ci from repo root without package-lock. Updated .github/workflows/release.yml to run npm ci/build in packages/ui and apps/console. Pushed commit fix: run npm ci in package directories for release.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fixed rust-crate working-directory issue: Build shared UI package and Build console frontend assets now use absolute paths via ${{ github.workspace }} to avoid inheriting job default rust/. Commit: fix: use absolute working directories in rust-crate.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fix for cargo package RustEmbed failure: embed assets now sourced from rust/embedded_assets/console (inside crate) so packaging includes them. Copied apps/console/dist into rust/embedded_assets/console and updated rust/src/bin/console_local.rs folder path. Commit: fix: embed console assets from crate directory.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Release workflow visibility: renamed publish job to a distinct job id/name for PyPI. Job id pypi-release with name 'PyPI Release' and updated downstream needs/refs to use needs.pypi-release outputs.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Release failure root cause: PyPI job attempted twine upload without dist when semantic-release reported no new release. Added release_ready gate to skip publish/verify and avoid failing when no dist; release_tag output now empty in that case.
